name: Universal Database MCP
description: Database connector for SQLite, PostgreSQL, and MySQL. Query data, explore schema, insert rows, and export to CSV. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: query_sql
tools.description: Execute a SQL query against a database. Supports SQLite, PostgreSQL, and MySQL.

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List all tables in a database.

tools.name: describe_table
tools.description: Describe a table's schema: column names, types, nullability, defaults,

tools.name: insert_row
tools.description: Insert a single row into a table. Column names and values are passed

tools.name: export_to_csv
tools.description: Execute a SELECT query and export results to a CSV file.
